body_txt: A Last Request where the " MacGuffin " in I'm Dying, Please Take My MacGuffin happens to be human. Someone dying asks someone to take care of their kids/family. Often implies a strong level of trust and respect between the two parties. Precedes Children Raise You , Promotion to Parent , and Parental Substitute . Often an Ending Trope but not always. It also works well simply at the end of a Story Arc or in a Backstory .
